page.title: AI × eBPF
page.description: eBPF-based tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agents and LLM systems.
page.bodyHtml:
WIP: We are building a benchmark for evaluating the optimizations for OS!

SchedCP is an experimental project that enables AI optimization of Linux kernel schedulers using the sched-ext framework. It provides e2e automatic scheduler selection/synthesis, workload profiling, and performance optimization without any human intervention or guidance.

Paper: SchedCP: Towards Agentic OS

The future is not just about letting AI write code for you; the AI agent should act as your system administrator, able to optimize anything for you automatically, without requiring any manual intervention!

GitHub Repository: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/schedcp ⭐

It includes the following tools:

  • autotune - AI Agent-powered automatic OS optimization
  • schedcp - MCP server for scheduler management and generation

Demo

Start optimize any workload with AI by simply run:

Allow LLM Agent to auto select and config the best scheduler:

Allow LLM Agents to write new schedulers:

Features & design

  • Automatic workload profiling
  • Automatic scheduler selection based on workload characteristics
  • Performance tracking across different schedulers
  • Real-time scheduler management and generation

The current MCP tools include:

  • list_schedulers - Get detailed information about all available schedulers
  • run_scheduler - Start schedulers with custom configurations
  • stop_scheduler - Stop running scheduler instances
  • get_execution_status - Monitor scheduler performance and output
  • create_and_verify_scheduler - Create custom BPF schedulers from source code
  • system_monitor - Collect real-time CPU, memory, and scheduler metrics
  • workload - Manage workload profiles and execution history

Installation

Requirements

  • Linux kernel 6.12+ with sched-ext support
  • Rust toolchain

The major dependencies are the dependencies for the sched-ext framework. You can check the github.com/sched-ext/scx for more details.

You also need to install the deps for the workloads you want to optimize.

Build

Usage

You should run the claude-code on project root directory.

Autotune (Recommended)

MCP Server

check the .mcp.json for more details. You can just open the claude-code on the

CLI Tool

Related Projects

  • sched-ext - Linux kernel BPF scheduler framework
  • Model Context Protocol - AI-application integration protocol

License

See LICENSE for details.

index.title: eBPF × AI/LLMs: The Convergence of System Observability and Artificial Intelligence
index.description: The convergence of Artificial Intelligence and eBPF is rapidly defining the next frontier in system software, creating a paradigm shift in both how we build and manage complex applications. As Large Language Models (LLMs

previous.title: GPTtrace Documentation
previous.description: Generate and run eBPF programs using natural language and AI. Trace your Linux system with GPT-powered automation and intelligent analysis.

description.en: eBPF-based tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agents and LLM systems.
description.zh: 面向 AI agent 和 LLM systems 的 eBPF tracing、observability 与安全工作。

intro.en: Execution engines, toolchains, runtime components, and low-level extension paths.
intro.zh: 执行引擎、工具链、runtime 组件和底层扩展路径。

intro.en: Tutorials, documentation, blog posts, and research papers for eBPF builders.
intro.zh: 面向 eBPF 开发者的教程、文档、博客和研究论文。

intro.en: Tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agent systems.
intro.zh: 面向 AI agent 系统的 tracing、observability 和安全研究。

description.en: A high-performance userspace eBPF runtime and extension framework for uprobes, USDT, syscall, XDP, GPU, and related workflows.
description.zh: 面向 userspace 的高性能 eBPF runtime 和扩展框架，覆盖 uprobe、USDT、syscall、XDP、GPU 等工作流。

description.en: Executable eBPF tutorials from hello world to sched-ext, networking, userspace tracing, and GPU scenarios.
description.zh: 从 hello world 到 sched-ext、网络、userspace tracing 和 GPU 场景的可执行 eBPF 教程。

description.en: Curated entry points for runtime documentation, project references, and practical eBPF guides across the site.
description.zh: 汇总 runtime 文档、项目参考和站内实用 eBPF 指南的入口。

description.en: Technical posts on eBPF, userspace runtimes, AI tracing, systems research, and production engineering notes.
description.zh: 关于 eBPF、userspace runtime、AI tracing、系统研究和工程实践的技术文章。

description.en: Research artifacts and paper links covering bpftime, LLM-assisted tracing, AI agent safety, and GPU systems work.
description.zh: 覆盖 bpftime、LLM-assisted tracing、AI agent safety 和 GPU systems 的研究产物与论文入口。

description.en: Build, package, distribute, and run eBPF programs with JSON metadata and WebAssembly OCI workflows.
description.zh: 使用 JSON metadata 和 WebAssembly OCI workflow 构建、打包、分发并运行 eBPF 程序。

description.en: Generate eBPF tracing programs with natural language and use LLMs to explore Linux kernel behavior.
description.zh: 用自然语言生成 eBPF tracing 程序，并借助 LLM 探索 Linux 内核行为。

description.en: Zero-instrumentation LLM and AI agent observability with eBPF, process monitoring, and TLS traffic correlation.
description.zh: 基于 eBPF、进程监控和 TLS traffic correlation 的零插桩 LLM 与 AI agent 可观测性。

description.en: A userspace eBPF VM with LLVM JIT/AOT support, used as the compiler and execution core of bpftime.
description.zh: 支持 LLVM JIT/AOT 的 userspace eBPF VM，也是 bpftime 的编译和执行核心。

description.en: WebAssembly-based eBPF tooling and runtime support for lightweight sandboxing and cloud native deployment.
description.zh: 基于 WebAssembly 的 eBPF 工具链和运行时支持，适合轻量级沙箱和云原生部署场景。

description.en: Research on semantic rollback attacks in agent checkpoint/restore workflows and intent-aware fencing.
description.zh: 关于 agent checkpoint/restore 工作流中语义回滚攻击和 intent-aware fencing 的研究。
